sourceNote: Community-aggregated advertised pull rates for a standard 24-pack One Piece booster box, from TCGTalk's box-pull-rate guide (2026): Leader ~1 per 2 packs (~12/box), Super Rare ~1 per 3 packs (~8/box), Parallel/Alternate Art ~2/box (~1 per 12 packs), Secret Rare ~1/box (~1 per 24 packs), Special Rare ~1 per case (~1 per 144 packs), Manga Rare ~1 per 2-6 cases (~1 in 576-1,728 packs). Bandai does not publish official odds, and this source discloses no sample size, so this table is capped at LOW confidence by design. The uniform-within-tier assumption is especially rough for One Piece: the Alternate Art tier spans sub-$5 commons to $100+ chase cards, so per-card odds within a tier are indicative only. Box-topper inserts (this set) are guaranteed per box but not modelled, so box EV is understated slightly. Prices are eBay-sold (PriceCharting); cards without a matched price are excluded from their tier average, never counted as $0.
